case_title: MARY HOLLOMAN VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: THIS CASE HAS BEEN COORDINATED WITH JCCP 4631: THE REGLAN/METOCLPORAMIDE CASES. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE PREVIOUSLY SCHEDULED IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. (304)
